name: notion
description: Notion integration extension — imports Notion pages and databases as a Knowledge Source, and exports ZEO deliverables to Notion.

capabilities.import: Retrieve Notion page and database contents as a Knowledge Source
capabilities.export: Output Specs, Plans, Tasks, and deliverables as Notion pages

note: Requires a Notion Integration Token. Create an Internal Integration in Notion and grant access to the target pages and databases.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
